case_title: LILLIAN HOM VS. TRISTANNA COX et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOM, LILLIAN AS TO DEFENDANT COX, TRISTANNA EDGEWOOD CENTER FOR CHILDREN AND FAMILIES DOES 1 THRU 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-25-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-22-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-10-2011

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-04-2011 CONTINUED TO MAY-16-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AGAINST DEFENDANT(S) TRISTANNA COX AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). THE APR-04-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF HOM, LILLIAN
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOM, LILLIAN SERVED FEB-03-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT EDGEWOOD CENTER FOR CHILDREN AND FAMILIES

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT & COMPLT [DECL OF MAILING AND DECL OF DILIGENCE ATTACHED THERTO], PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOM, LILLIAN SERVED FEB-09-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT COX, TRISTANNA
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: SIMMONS, DENNIS EDWARD SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR HOM, LILLIAN
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOM, LILLIAN ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE OF ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PENDING SERVICE OF PROCESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOM, LILLIAN
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON JAN-04-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-16-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JAN-04-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-04-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-25-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
